mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_timestamp (apply_id, title, file_name, file_hash, file_size, apply_status, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_time, remark) VALUES (#{applyId}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileHash}, #{fileSize}, #{applyStatus}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyUserName}, NOW(3), #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_timestamp SET title = #{title}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_hash = #{fileHash}, file_size = #{fileSize}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE data_timestamp SET apply_status = #{applyStatus}, timestamp_value = #{timestampValue}, cert_number = #{certNumber}, issue_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE data_timestamp SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
